seoDescription: Building Repair & Management (BRM Builders) is a Santa Rosa general contractor for custom homes, remodels, additions, and foundation repair. CA Lic. #903189.
heroHeading: From foundation lifts to finished custom homes in the North Bay
heroSubheading: Family-rooted Santa Rosa general contractor with 47 years of combined building experience and a CA general contractor license.
highlights: Locally owned and operated in Sonoma County
aboutBody: BRM Builders is the working name of Building Repair & Management, Inc., a locally owned and operated general contractor serving Santa Rosa and the wider Sonoma County area. President Christian Andersen comes from a North Bay building family — he learned his standards from his father, respected Sonoma County builder Marsh Andersen — and has since built and renovated countless homes across the region.

The team handles everything from new custom homes and major remodels to structural and foundation repair, including complex restorations like a 1906 Healdsburg historic home that needed its foundation rebuilt while preserving the original character. The company holds California license #903189 and is BBB Accredited with an A+ rating.

services.title: New custom homes
services.description: Ground-up residential construction built to high North Bay standards.

services.title: Remodels & additions
services.description: Kitchen, bath, and room additions that expand and update existing homes.

services.title: Foundation & structural repair
services.description: Foundation rebuilds, structural repair, and historic-home restoration.

services.title: Damage restoration
services.description: Fire, smoke, and water damage repair and rebuilds.

services.title: Tenant & commercial improvements
services.description: Tenant improvements and commercial build-out projects.

services.title: Design-build
services.description: Architectural drawings, engineering, and design coordination through construction.

notes: CONFIRMED: BRM Builders = Building Repair & Management, Inc. (BRM is the acronym) — same Santa Rosa business; verified via brmbuild.com, BBB, Facebook (both 'Building Repair & Management Inc.' and 'BRM Builders' pages), BuildZoom, Houzz. CA Contractors State License Board #903189 (expires 2027-09-30). Owner/President: Christian (Michael) Andersen. BBB Accredited since 2018-11-09, A+. Corporation established ~2006-2007; site frames it as '47 years of combined experience.' Two phone numbers appear publicly: (707) 481-6228 (site/contact) and (707) 527-8797 (directories). PHOTO NOTE: brmbuild.com/images/customkitchen.jpg is a STOCK family-in-kitchen image and was EXCLUDED; custombathroom.jpg could not be verified as BRM's own and was excluded. Only the two confirmed real jobsite photos (a house on cribbing for a foundation lift, and active framing with the builders on site) are included. No real aggregate rating with a credible count was found (Birdeye lists 5 stars on only 3 reviews; Houzz had none) — rating OMITTED. Hours and attributable testimonial quotes were not verifiable — left empty.
